### 2026-03-11T12:21Z: Game Pages template and blog automation skills created
**By:** Chewie
**What:** Two new skills document reusable patterns: (1) game-pages-template for consistent showcase sites across repos, (2) blog-automation for auto-generated blog posts from ceremonies/milestones/releases
**Why:** Enables any new game repo to quickly set up branded Pages and ensures the hub blog stays current with game progress
